feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Document and Reporting Compliance
feed.subtitle: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: GST Reconciliation Report - India
entry.content:
Hello all,

We've a requirement that business wants to have a proper tax report which includes all the data related to GST as well as TDS apart from DRC Reporting (GSTR1, GSTR3B, GSTR6, FORM26Q, FORM27Q and FORM27EQ). 

Is there any application in SAP Public Cloud which will provide the data for all GST and TDS transactions? For other countries we've used "Tax Declaration Reconciliation" app but this will not work for India Localization

Please help me out as on this topic as soon as possible.

Thank you

entry.title: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance for Polish SAF-T Regulatory Requirements
entry.content:
We are thinking of implementing SAP and are therefore looking for a solution for our Polish subsidiary to cover the requirements of the Polish tax authorities for mandatory SAF-T reporting. As we plan to use SAP S/4HANA public cloud, the SAP Add-on for Polish SAF-T Regulatory Requirements cannot be used (as far as I understood).

In 2023 ‘SAP Document and Reporting Compliance’ was not yet able to cover the requirements of the Polish authorities. But what about today?

In this webinar (Standard Audit File-Tax (SAF-T) - Statutory Reporting in Poland (JPK) - SAP Product Strategy) here at the end of the last year there was an item on the agenda called "'Transition from SAP Add-on for Polish SAF-T Regulatory Requirements’ to ‘SAP Document and Reporting Compliance’".

entry.title: Edocument framework installiation 3005076 note deleted cl_edocument super class
entry.content:
Dear experts,

We are currently implementing Edocument framework for an S4hana 105 1 SP system.
Unfortunately TCI usage is not available in this system. We started implementing the notes manually.
We are at 3005076 note Document Compliance Framework (27) what deleted everything from cl_edocument definition.  That class is needed and we can't complete the implementation without this class.  (In other systems where we used TCI we did not face any issue with this class).

Do you have any advice or idea what step are missing?

 

we are following this list:

Reference: List of SAP Notes included in the TCI | SAP Help Portal

The prerequisites notes are implemented correctly.

entry.title: SAP DRC, Peppol / Error at PUSH operation HTTP response code: 500
entry.content:
Hi All,

does someone have an idea why we get HTTP response code: 500 for URL: http://XXX:44300/sap/bc/srt/rfc/sap/dcppushservice/100/dcppushservice/pushrequest

 

A webservice trace showed the following:

 

Send Document was successfull, but push Response to Source System fails.

 

 

Does anybody has a hint or idea where we can analyze further?

 

Thanks in advance,

Vasili

entry.title: Portugal EInvoice - Is it a mandatory requirement to generate electronic customer invoices?
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a requirement to send customer electronic invoices to a service provider (like Saphety) from S/4 Hana (private edition or on premises).

Is it necessary to install the document compliance and report framework, or there's an alternative flow in S/4? 

From what we've saw in sap note 2134248, it seems that the document compliance and report framework is necessary for "legal compliance aspects", not for all electronic invoices. This question is also because we're worried that this may cost an extra subscription for the customer.

thank you.

Best regards,

Nuno Fonseca

entry.title: Edocument Brasil - Simular fatura customizado
entry.content:
Olá pessoal!

Estamos em um projeto onde o cliente solicitou a customização do processo de entrada com escrituração do CT-e pelo edoc_cockpit, no DRC não é entregue solução conforme existe no GRC (CTEINBTM), criamos um processo Z com cópia do processo BRCTEFLEX.

Desenvolvemos a tela para executar o passo de Simular Fatura, pois o usuário necessita conferir o cálculo de imposto antes de postá-la. Para realizar a simulação estamos usando a BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_CREATE com o flag simulate no header, essa função não retorna o valor dos impostos na simulação, só retorna a mensagem de erro de diferenças de valor ou sucesso.
Nesse cliente não tem TM nesse processo, buscamos os dados de pedido em uma tabela Z.

Teriam alguma dica de como poderíamos fazer?

Agradeço pela colaboração.
Jossiane

entry.title: How add custom field on XML/PDF on a eDocument for Chile?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I need to add a custom field to the XML and PDF of an eDocument for Chile in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. However, I haven't found a specific BAdI for Chile that allows adding custom fields.

I noticed that there is a BAdI called EDOC_MX_FILL_CUSTOM_DATA, which is used for other countries like Mexico to modify the eDocument XML before generation and another BAdI to add this field to PDF also for Mexico.  App Extensibility: eDocument Cockpit 

Would this BAdI work for Chile as well? If not, is there a General BAdI or another recommended approach to add custom fields to the eDocument XML/PDF for Chile?

I appreciate any insights or guidance you can provide.
Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Saf-T reporting for Bulgaria
entry.content:
Good day,

 

I will soon be implementing a SAF-T report for Bulgaria and I was looking for advice. Anyone that has done this for other countries can give me some recommendations for Do’s and Dont’s? 

 

looking forward to your reply,

Nikola

entry.title: Comlemento de Pago de Factoraje con DRC?
entry.content:
Hola equipo, Actualmente con DRC eDocument obtengo los complementos de pago de los clientes, tengo un escenario de factoraje el cual incluye dos nodos de pago en la estructura del XML requerida por el SAT. Alguna idea de manejo de este escenario o de incluir el segundo pago mediante la ampliación edoc_adaptor?

Gracias de Antemano

Martín

entry.title: SNBCH - Zahlungsbilanz Schweiz - sehr lange Laufzeit
entry.content:
Hallo Experten 

vielleicht hätte jemand Erfahrung mit der Einrichtung der Schweizer Zahlungsbilanz. Wir haben im Customizing das Externe Meldewesen eingerichtet und bekommen auch eine Ausgabe wenn wir die Transaktion SNBCH aufrufen, aber es dauert ca. 2 Stunden bis der Report das Ergebnis ausgibt. 

Folgende Einstellungen haben wir im Customizing getätigt. 

1. Einrichten ihres externen Meldewesens 

2. Meldekategorie definieren -> Hier haben wir einen Eintrag für "CAS-G" definiert. 

3. Meldeunterkategorien definieren -> Hier haben mehrere Unterkategorien definiert (5.1, 9.1, 9.2, 9.3, 9.4 etc.) 

4. Kriterien für die Zuordnung von Belegen zu Meldekategorie/-unterkategorie definieren -> Hier haben wir zur Meldekategorie CAS-G mehrere HKONT Einträge zu den Meldeunterkategorien definiert, mit fortlaufender Laufnummer. HKONT Ranges und auch einzelne Konten. 

Wenn wir nun den Report mit SNBCH aufrufen und eine Selektion mitgeben auf Belegarten, Debitoren, Kreditoren oder deren Abstimmkonten, läuft der Report im Hintergrund ca. 2 Stunden und findet 65 Einträge. 

In unserem System sind sehr viele Daten, Millionen Einzelposten, könnte es sein, dass dieser Report so lange läuft, da es sich um einen R3 Report handelt und nicht auf S4 optimiert ist? Als BKPF/BSEG auswertet anstatt ACDOCA? 

Wir können uns sonst die lange Laufzeit nicht erklären. 

Vielleicht hätte ja jemand bereits ähnliche Erfahrung oder einen Tipp, wie die Laufzeit beschleunigt werden könnte. 

Besten Dank und viele Grüsse

Thomas

entry.title: Ireland IE_RTD_DCL DRC report as PDF???
entry.content:
Hi experts,

My customer says that this report should be generated as a PDF file. Is there this possibility to generate a PDF file within the DRC? Or does anyone of you know any other possibility?

Thanks in advance for any advice!

Rado

entry.title: SG GST Report - Not able to download data from preview
entry.content:
Hello. We are dealing with reports from Singapore, Japan etc...  While working with Japan, in the preview there is the possibility to download the data Tables to Excel. 

However for Singapore, once the report has been run, we get the message "SG GST Report cannot be downloaded". In note 3451521 - Information "& cannot be downloaded" in app Run Statutory Reports they address this issue and the solution is to download the data from the Preview. But for Singapore there is no way to download the data from the preview (download button does not appear). Any ideas how to solve it?. Thank you.

entry.title: J1B3N-reprint Danfe DRC
entry.content:
Hello!

We are implementing DRC to replace GRC NF-e. One of the new things delivered by SAP was the B2B event sending out XML and DANFE automatically that was a Z solution before. DANFE layout has been implemented successfully, however, in J1BNFE still exists the functionality to reprint DANFW that calls another DANFE form (old Z implemented years ago in our company). I’d like to understand the best practice or solution, is there anyone calling the DANFE via API in DRC to be displayed in ECC?

entry.title: Hungary Audit report: how to run the report in Public cloud without Sales invoice
entry.content:
Hello Everybody,

When we run the DRC Hungary Audit report, it generate nothing with the Error message" Element szamla occurs 0 times. Number of occurrences must be >= 1".I've check the best practice document , it said that "In this activity, the Audit Report based on Sales and Distribution (SD) invoices displays and downloads". But we have not implemented the SD module, all sales invoice are from maunal posting.

In this way, how can we use the Hungary audit report? 

In addintion,can anyboby help describe the difference abount the HungaryAudit Report and Hungary Real-Time Invoice Reporting ?

Many thanks!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP Document and Reporting Compliance

entry.title: ACR for Consumption Tax Reporting in Japan
entry.content:
Hi Community,

The Client that I work for wants us to implement ACR for Consumption Tax Reporting in Japan but is not willing to give us access to S-ID. Without the S-ID I am unsure how to proceed with the implementation since I cannot access any notes or KBAs. But they want us to give them the note number so that they would check and give us whatever is necessary(I do not know how this would work)

Since I am new to this kind of implementation, could someone please suggest where I can refer to as an alternative? Is there any other way that I can convince them to give me an S-ID (I want to explain them there are no security issues)?

entry.title: Italy eDocument for zero value invoices
entry.content:
Hi, 

There is a requirement from our Italy clients to develop sales and invoice document types for selling samples to customers. When I made the changes in Development system for a zero value samples invoice, the eDocument is failing. When I created the same invoice with a 0.01 EUR value, the eDocument was transmitted. Does this mean that Italy eDocument does not work for zero value invoices? Could someone please provide a note or KBA to confirm or resolve this?

Thanks,
Vishnu

entry.title: Configuration for the Incoming Supplier Invoices in the E-Document Cockpit for Spain
entry.content:
How to configure the Incoming Invoices from Supplier E-Invoices in E-document cockpit for Spain?



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Assign SAP form EDOC_MY_PDF_INVOICE_FORM in eDocument Mayalsia
entry.content:
How to assign EDOC_MY_PDF_INVOICE_FORM in order to display electronic invoices in PDF format?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Document Reporting & compliance general questions
entry.content:
Hi DRC Experts, 

I am an FI Consultant who wants to check if DRC is applicable for one of our clients (SAP S4/Hana on Premise). 

I see that SAP uses Peppol Solution heavily in their DRC supported Scenarios. 

Assuming the suppliers dont have Peppol access point, how can DRC Process following scenarios:

  1. Incoming supplier invoices (Paper & PDF) 
  2. Incoming Purchases orders (PDF or XML) 

then I have some specific questions which I couldnt find explicitly in the SAP Documentation:

  1. how does DRC chooses the communication method (email or Peppol) for sending E-invoices?
  2. how does DRC chooses the E-invoice format (ZUGFERD , X-Rechnung etc.)?
  3. Is it possible to send same E-Invoice to multiple customers? how? 

These are critical questions to anwer before we can suggest DRC Solution to our client. 

Thanks for your expertise. 

Regards

Rashed

entry.title: Document and Reporting Compliance, Cloud Edition - Binding Creation fails endlessly
entry.content:
Hi, while creating the new instances bulding test instance for Peppol services was done flawless, binding creation was smooth and done fast. We are using the same certificate of ERP in every cloud solution, different type of systems , CPI etc., no problems at all. I couldn't create the binding for the Document and Reporting Compliance production instance, I did it several times and it runs enless until it stops with no positive result. Any suggestions? 

Test

PRD

Thank you very much!

Regards

Uwe
